Tests the behavior of Math.pow with negative infinity as the base and 5 as the exponent.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It verifies that raising negative infinity to the power of 5 results in negative infinity. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression `Math.pow(-Infinity, 5) === -Infinity` evaluates to true. This test is likely part of a larger suite to validate mathematical operations and their compliance with expected results in JavaScript.
